title: The Time of His Life
writer: Leslie S. Hiscott, Brock Williams, Richard Hearne
actors: Richard Hearne, Ellen Pollock, Richard Wattis
plot: The ex-convict father of a prominent society woman is released from prison, and goes to live with his daughter. She pretends he is an old friend, but tries to keep him out of sight, but all he wants to do is go back to prison.
